chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3743 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ تُمَاكِسْ فِي أَرْبَعَةِ أَشْيَاءَ فِي اَلْأُضْحِيَّةِ وَ فِي اَلْكَفَنِ وَ فِي ثَمَنِ نَسَمَةٍ وَ فِي اَلْكِرَى إِلَى مَكَّةَ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3743 - Imam (as) said: "Do not bargain in four things; the sacrificial animal, the shroud, the price of freeing a slave, and the fare to Makkah."
